metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_16
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Purkinje cell dendritic spines (sp) receiving asymmetrical synapses from parallel fiber terminals (PFT) are Kv3.3 immunopositive.

5/12/2016 Pim
- The integral component of the annotation was derived from the TM-domains of KCNC3.
- Literal Fig.2: "Purkinje cell dendritic spines ( sp ) receiving asymmetrical synapses from parallel fiber terminals ( PFT ) are Kv3.3 immunopositive ( arrows in a - e ). Silver particles are positioned perisynaptically but also in **extrasynaptic positions ( arrows in a - e ) along the spine membranes**.". Experimental description: Results Fig 2: "Fig. 1 Subcellular compartmentalization of Kv3.1b in the **rat** cerebellar molecular layer. Pre-embedding immunogold method for electron microscopy using parasagittal cerebellar sections....."
